match.userMessage:
Eye-level wide handheld shot with natural micro-movement frames Scarlett turning slowly toward the endless horizon as a wave rushes up and breaks at her bare ankles. The lipstick tube lands beside the embossed mark in the sand while foam swirls around her feet. She speaks the line with soft reflective poise, coral lips catching golden light. Water gently laps at the tube as the frame lingers on the bright open ocean stretching to the horizon.

[SCARLETT, soft reflective]: "One shade. One summer."

Ambient sounds: gentle ocean waves and soft shoreline wash. small wave breaking at ankles, foam swishing around feet, water lapping at lipstick tube.
